title: Multi-table update produces incorrect results
key_bug_features: Multi-table update with incorrect result handling
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE table1 (col1 INT PRIMARY KEY, col2 INT NOT NULL, col3 VARCHAR(50));
CREATE TABLE table2 (col1 INT PRIMARY KEY, col2 INT DEFAULT 0, col3 FLOAT);
INSERT INTO table1 (col1, col2, col3) VALUES (1, 10, 'test1'), (2, 20, 'test2');
INSERT INTO table2 (col1, col2, col3) VALUES (1, 5, 1.5), (2, NULL, 2.5);
UPDATE table1 SET col2 = (SELECT SUM(col2) FROM table2 WHERE table2.col1 = table1.col1) WHERE col1 = 1;
